Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: From suppressors to a shotgun fresh off the movie set of John Wick 4, the contestants got spoiled this week with amazing tactical weapons. Chris and Cindy sit down with Genesis Arms to get the scoop on how the team is doing prior to the finale. Mark Baylis, Green Beret, also sits down with our hosts to talk about his invaluable nonprofit that is changing the lives of hundreds of American Veterans.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: White Comanche 1968
programme.desc: In White Comanche, William Shatner takes on a daring double role as twin brothers—one a peace-seeking drifter, the other a ruthless Comanche warrior bent on bloodshed. As the frontier town reels from raids and rising violence, the brothers are set on a collision course that can only end in a deadly showdown. Filled with tense standoffs, frontier action, and Shatner’s commanding presence, this Spaghetti Western delivers a tale of fate, family, and vengeance.

programme.title: Massacre Time 1966
programme.desc: In Massacre Time, Franco Nero blazes onto the Spaghetti Western scene as Tom Corbett, a drifter who returns home to find his family’s land stolen and his brother living in ruin. Together, the two face a ruthless tyrant and his sadistic son who rule with terror and bloodshed. Directed by Lucio Fulci, this violent, gripping tale delivers brutal gunfights, raw emotion, and the relentless pursuit of vengeance.

programme.title: The Deserter
programme.desc: During the Civil War an Irish Union soldier attempts to flee for his homeland.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers 1952
programme.desc: In The Bushwhackers, John Ireland stars as a war-weary Confederate soldier who drifts west seeking peace, only to find violence waiting on the frontier. When ruthless land barons use guns and terror to drive settlers from their homes, he’s forced to take up arms once more. With Lon Chaney Jr. and Lawrence Tierney adding menace and intrigue, this tense Western delivers a hard-hitting tale of greed, justice, and a reluctant hero who can’t outrun the fight for what’s right.

programme.title: Rough Riders' Round-Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over, Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen. Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices.

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm: Surviving Hurricane Ian
programme.desc: Hurricane Ian unleashed catastrophic destruction across Southwest Florida, washing entire neighborhoods to sea. As loved ones are separated and communities face unimaginable loss, extraordinary acts of courage emerge in the storm’s aftermath.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Is This a Pork Chop?
programme.desc: Chef Yesinia Melo of Jessy’s Clean Meals in Lawrence takes on Chef Jason Gentles of Sahel in Lowell in a spicy battle of the mill towns. Can Yesinia’s fresh cooking put the Jerk champion in his place? Or will Jason knock it out of the park?

programme.title: Unbelievable: Rescues From the Brink
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.
